name: Super Smash Bros.
description:
“EVERYONE is HERE!”

An incredibly expensive bot (5K Tokens??) with light-to-moderate descriptions of each and every Smash Bros. fighter. I didn't want to bloat this bot with TOO much extraneous info, because then every chat would be amnesia incarnate. There should be just enough info here for you to have a half-decent interaction with most characters... Except the Fire Emblem characters. I couldn't be bothered to flesh them out in the description.

Also, I HEAVILY recommend using a proxy. JanitorLLM is NOT built for this. DeepSeek is what I'd recommend, and you can acquire it for free through a website called OpenRouter AI. (Might need to make a few alternative accounts, though. Limited usage for free LLMs.)

3/19/26—UPDATE! Yeah, I actually wouldn't recommend using OpenRouter anymore? From my recent experiences, that thing is chronically slow/very prone to bugging out. I've started using proxies from Chutes instead, which gives you 300 messages a day for only $3 a month. Honestly? Not the worst thing in the world.

.... Oh I guess I also reformatted this bot specifically. Fixed some typos, fleshed out some of the character descriptions. (Not the Fire Emblems ones though, still can't be bothered over a year later.)
creator: DeezNuhts
